name: teacher-operating-system
description: Teacher Operating System (TOS): a hub-and-spoke ecosystem of governed K-12 teacher skills that generate, validate, differentiate, route, and maintain educational artifacts. Skills under skills/ are auto-discovered; shared engines (standards, context, connectors, students, records, docintel, routing, traversal, health) provide the governed core. Offline/stdlib; decision-support with human_review_required; placeholders only in the repo.
